title: Add data-testid hooks to landing-hero.tsx (attributes only)
acceptance_criteria: HeroSection: the <form className="url-bar"> gets data-testid="hero-scan-form"; input#hero-url gets data-testid="hero-url-input"; the submit <button> gets data-testid="hero-scan-submit"
FinalCTASection: the Link to /pricing gets data-testid="final-cta-pricing"
ONLY data-testid attributes added — zero behaviour/markup/style/logic changes; no other elements touched
npm run lint and npm run build pass; existing unit tests unaffected
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
